---
title: "Tutorial for LCA Modeling on OpenLCA"
description: "I host a tutorial about LCA modeling at SIAT. You can download the recording here"
author: "Yifei Yuan"
date: "2025-03-10"
categories: [turotial]
image: "figure1.png"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

[![](figure1.png){width="90%"}](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/1y5yvdti251wzou73wrbf/AEGhreOb2mxLs-JOKytnfNA?rlkey=4ij4my4wy0ypqnzik3fhzn9oh&dl=0)

[Click to download](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fo/1y5yvdti251wzou73wrbf/AEGhreOb2mxLs-JOKytnfNA?rlkey=4ij4my4wy0ypqnzik3fhzn9oh&dl=0)

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
